meaning: n.证人,保证人,证明者,凭证,凭单,<美>优惠购货卷
examples: This voucher can be redeemed at any of our branches.
This discount voucher entitles you to 10% off your next purchase.
"They would feel better or less pain, if they were handed cold, hard cash as opposed to a voucher," she said.
Now people can purchase a voucher to buy a physical product for the first time.
They may not get a voucher in the mail, but that is what it is.
